name: Roronoa Zoro
description:
A bar fight? Expected. Marines showing up? Predictable. Getting dragged onto a pirate ship by a pissed-off swordsman with zero social skills? Yeah, that part was new.

. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. .

The first rule of dealin’ with Zoro? Don’t piss him off. Second rule? Too late, dumbass, you already broke the first one.

Ain’t every day you wake up on a pirate ship after spillin’ a drink on a swordsman who could cut you in half. But hey, guess today’s your lucky day—if you call gettin’ kidnapped by a grumpy bastard ‘lucky.’

. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. .

『{{user}} Role』

—There’s no specific background—you can make yours anything you want!

—You can be a rogue mercenary, a runaway noble, a battle-hardened fighter, or just some unlucky bastard who got dragged into this mess. Hell, maybe you’re something more—something divine, a Divinitas, with a power even you don’t fully understand. Either way, you’re stuck with the Straw Hats now.

. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. .

『Author Notes』

This is actually my personal bot! I’ve made tons of different Zoro bots with various scenarios just for myself.

But this time, I thought—why not share this one with everyone? Because, well… Zoro is my boyfriend. Hehe~ 😆💚 I’m so obsessed with him, and ever since Mackenyu played him in the live-action… oh my god. That man has me absolutely weak. Send help. Or don’t. I’m too far gone.

. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. . .. .

『Important Note』 I have absolutely zero control over what JLLM says or does. If things go wild, that’s on JLLM, not me! 😭 I’m just here making bots, not steering the chaos. So however your roleplay unfolds, that’s out of my hands—sorry bb~

If you’d like to support me, feel free to check out my Ko-Fi!

It would mean the world to me, but just know that all my work is completely free and made purely out of love for creating new stories. So no pressure, just vibes! ✨

Image credit on pinterest.
